summary: Iteration 6: Gemini Prompt Feature Testing Complete. All 8 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - all three textareas (PROMPT TO GEMINI, QWEN, OPENCV) are always visible in Step 2 when a feedback is selected. The gemini-prompt-input is pre-filled with feedback data context. Backend POST /api/training/analyze/{id} accepts custom_prompt in body and uses it for LLM calls.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/training/feedbacks returns list of feedbacks
Backend: POST /api/training/analyze/{id} with custom_prompt in body works correctly
Backend: POST /api/training/analyze/{id} without custom_prompt uses default prompt
Backend: POST /api/training/analyze with non-existent ID returns 404
Backend: POST /api/training/submit-prompts requires at least one prompt (400 on empty)
Backend: GET /api/training/updates returns list of updates
Frontend: Login flow works (heart click → EKG animation → form → hub)
Frontend: Step 1 Feedback Queue shows 6 pending feedbacks
Frontend: Clicking feedback navigates to Step 2
Frontend: PROMPT TO GEMINI textarea (data-testid: gemini-prompt-input) is ALWAYS visible in Step 2
Frontend: PROMPT TO GEMINI textarea is pre-filled with feedback data context (357 chars)
Frontend: PROMPT TO GEMINI contains sentinel_id, assigned_status, correct_status, subscriber, comments
Frontend: QWEN textarea (data-testid: qwen-prompt-input) is ALWAYS visible in Step 2
Frontend: OPENCV textarea (data-testid: opencv-rule-input) is ALWAYS visible in Step 2
Frontend: SUBMIT TO QWEN FOR ANALYSIS button (data-testid: analyze-submit-btn) is visible
Frontend: SUBMIT PROMPTS button (data-testid: submit-prompts-btn) is visible
seed_data_creation: 6 pending feedbacks synced from Readisys API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gemini Prompt feature verified working. Step 2 now has THREE textareas: 1) PROMPT TO GEMINI (editable, pre-filled with feedback context), 2) QWEN (for Gemini result or custom prompt), 3) OPENCV (for Gemini result or custom rule). POST /api/training/analyze/{id} accepts {custom_prompt} in body. LLM call takes 10-25 seconds. Steps 4-5 still mocked.

mocked_apis_list: POST /api/training/apply/{update_id} (mocked - applies update record but doesn't call real Qwen/OpenCV)

gemini_prompt_textarea.pre_fill_content: Contains AED Unit, Subscriber, AI classified status, Correct status, Comments
